sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24434" key="D.H.mopra/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δημο-πράτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n24434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">auctioneer of public goods,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
